channel.title: Ad News Feed
channel.description: 広告プラットフォーム最新情報の自動収集フィード

item.title: [Google] Changes to Customer Match Support in the Google Ads API
item.description: Starting on April 1, 2026, the Google Ads API will no longer accept new adopters of Customer Match. As with our recent announcement for the use of

item.title: [Google] Minimum Budget Requirement for Demand Gen Campaigns
item.description: Starting on April 1st, 2026, the Google Ads API will begin enforcing a minimum daily budget of 5 USD, or the equivalent in local currency, for all Demand Gen campaigns. This update ensures that campaigns have adequate budget to navigate the initial "cold start" phase, during which our models lea

item.title: [Google] Introducing Google Ads API Developer Assistant v2.0
item.description: This major update transforms the Assistant from a powerful code generation tool into a proactive troubleshooting and automa

item.title: [Google] Additional changes for supporting European Union Political Ads Regulation in Google Ads API and Google Ads scripts
item.description:
What’s changing?

In 2025, Google rolled out changes to support the EU Political Ads Regulation in the Google

item.title: [Google] Announcing v23.1 of the Google Ads API
item.description: Today, we’re announcing the v23.1 release of the Google Ads API. To use the new v23.1 features, you must upgrade your client libraries and client code. All the u

item.title: [Google] Announcing Android Google Mobile Ads SDK 25.0.0
item.description: Version 25.0.0 of the Android Google Mobile Ads SDK is now available. We recommend upgrading as soon as possible to take advantage of the latest features, performance improvements, and API updates. This is a major version update that includes several breaking changes, new functionality for optim

item.title: [Google] Announcing user list management and enhanced audience ingestion for the Data Manager API
item.description: We're excited to announce the release of v1.5 of the Data Manager API, delivering a more comprehensive platform for data management. This update introduces powerful new capabilities for managing user lists alon

item.title: [Google] Announcing iOS Google Mobile Ads SDK Version 13.0.0
item.description:
Version 13.0.0 of the Google Mobile Ads SDK for iOS is now available. We recommend upgrading as soon as possible to take advantage of the latest features, performance improvements, and API updates.

Updates in Version 13.0.0

  • Increased minimum deployment target:

item.title: [Google] An update on Google Ads API developer token access applications
item.description: With the recent release of Explorer Access for the Google Ads API, Google Ads API MCP server and the

item.title: [Google] Announcing the Google Mobile Ads Next-Gen SDK for Android
item.description: We are announcing the Google Mobile Ads (GMA) Next-Gen SDK for Android, a significant rewrite of the Google Mobile Ads SDK that prioritizes speed, stability, and an improved developer experience. See the developer guides to get started today (

item.title: [Google] Introducing Channel-Level Reporting for Performance Max campaigns
item.description:
Following yesterday's launch of Google Ads API v23, we are excited to share more details about one of the most highly requested features: Channel-level reporting for Performance Max campaigns.

This update provides developers and advertisers with unprecedented transparency into where the

item.title: [Google] Announcing v23 of the Google Ads API
item.description: Today, we’re announcing the v23 release of the Google Ads API. This marks the first release of 2026 and the beginning of our move to a faster

item.title: [Google] Campaign Manager 360 API v4 Sunset Reminder
item.description:
Campaign Manager 360 API v4 will be sunset on February 26, 2026. Starting on this date, all v4 API requests will begin to fail. If you’re still using this version, we strongly encourage you to migrate to v5 as soon as possible to avoid service interruptions.

See the

item.title: [Google] Campaign and Insertion Order targeting will sunset in Display & Video 360 API and Structured Data Files on February 23, 2026
item.description: In November, we announced the upcoming sunset of Campaign and Insertion Order targeting in the Display & Video 360 API and Structured Data Files. This sunset will take place on February 23,

item.title: [Google] Changes to IP Address and Session Attribute Support in the Google Ads API
item.description: Starting on February 2, 2026, the Google Ads API will no longer accept new adopters of session attributes or

item.title: [Google] Google Ads API v19 sunset reminder
item.description: Google Ads API v19 will sunset on February 11, 2026. Starting on this date, all v19 API requests will begin to fail. Migrate to a newer version

item.title: [Google] Update your PAL integration for new limited ads behavior
item.description:
The Programmatic Access Library (PAL) is updating user privacy and data usage settings, and requires implementation updates as these changes go live. This update introduces the following changes:

  • PAL reads Transparency & Consent Framework (TCF) data from the device to determine user

item.title: [Google] Introducing the Google Ads API Developer Assistant v1.0: Interact with the API using Natural Language
item.description: Announcing the release of the Google Ads API Developer Assistant, a powerful extension for Gemini CLI designed to streamline your Google Ads API workflows. This tool allows you to interact with the Goog

item.title: [Google] The Data Manager API is Now Generally Available
item.description: The Data Manager API, a new solution for data ingestion across Google’s advertising platforms, is now generally available. This API is designed to streamline how advertisers, agencies, and data partners send and manage their first-part

item.title: [Google] Sunsetting Google Ads API, Google Ads Scripts, and Campaign Manager 360 API Developer Support Forums on Google Groups
item.description:
To streamline our technical support channels, we will be sunsetting the following developer support forums on Google Groups:

  • Google Ads API
  • Google Ads Scripts

item.title: [Google] Upcoming changes to targeting in Display & Video 360 API and Structured Data Files
item.description: Today, we’re deprecating Insertion Order and Campaign-level targeting management in Display & Video 360 API and Structured Data Files (SDFs) and

item.title: [Google] Announcing v202511 of the Google Ad Manager API
item.description: We're pleased to announce that v202511 of the Google Ad Manager API is available now. This release provides support for targeting Publisher Provided Signals

item.title: [Google] Launching Structured Data Files v9.2
item.description: Today we’re announcing the general availability of Structured Data Files v9.2. All users can now use

item.title: [Google] Explorer access is now available for Google Ads API developers
item.description: We are rolling out a new Explorer Access level access tier for Google Ads API over the next couple of weeks. This will allow new developers signing up for Google Ads API to gain immediate access to production

item.title: [Google] October 2025 update to Display & Video 360 API
item.description:
Today, we’re announcing the October 2025 update to the Display & Video 360 API. This update includes the following:

  • The ability to create and retrieve

item.title: [Bing] Decoding Ramadan 2026: Data-Driven Strategies for the Middle East, Türkiye, and Africa
item.description: Microsoft Advertising and InMobi Advertising highlight key Ramadan consumer and search trends in the Middle East, Türkiye, and Africa, outlining marketing

item.title: [Bing] AI web and zero UI: What your brand should do when the web stops asking you to click
item.description: What happens when the web stops asking you to click? Learn how the AI Web and zero UI are reshaping discovery, action, and what brands must do next.

item.title: [Bing] Advanced Consent Mode: Preserving accurate measurement while respecting user privacy
item.description: Advanced Consent Mode can help you respect user privacy choices, maintain trust, and provide the insights needed to measure and boost performance.

item.title: [Bing] Build real-world Performance Max expertise with the new Microsoft Advertising learning path
item.description: Get practical training on Microsoft Advertising Performance Max in our new learning path, from setup to optimization—plus earn a sharable badge.

item.title: [Bing] Ad preview hub and other product news for February 2026
item.description: See what’s new in Microsoft Advertising for February 2026: an enhanced ad preview hub for Audience ads, plus Performance Max and Google import updates.

item.title: [Bing] Celebrating A Year of Achievement and Excellence: Microsoft Advertising Partner Program 2026
item.description: Join us as we take a look at some of the Microsoft Advertising Partner Program’s most notable events of 2025 and explore exciting changes for 2026.

item.title: [Bing] Understanding AI search: A guide for modern marketers
item.description: The updated AI Marketer’s Guide is a practical blueprint that shows how AI‑powered search works and the actions marketers can take to drive results.

item.title: [Bing] All in on AI: “The Ultimate Amplifier”
item.description: Kellyn of Zenith Australia reveals how AI is reshaping marketing in APAC, from augmented workflows to scalable performance and future-ready agentic tools.

item.title: [Meta] Facebook Marketplace’s New Meta AI Tools Make Selling Faster and Easier
[Media] Meta Announces Location Fees (Plus 4 Updates)
[Media] 80% of PMax Advertisers Are Now Running CTV Ads: What Google’s YouTube TV Expansion Means for Your Ad Budget
item.description: If you are running Performance Max campaigns in Google Ads, there is a better-than-even chance that your ads are already appearing on connected television screens — and you may not have set that up intentionally, audited the creative, or even noticed it happening. According to data published by M

item.title: [Media] Yahoo MyScout Launched: How the First Personalized AI Homepage Changes Search, Content Strategy, and Publisher Traffic in 2026
item.description: Search has not stood still for decades, but what happened in January and March of 2026 may represent one of its sharpest pivots yet. Yahoo — a company most people mentally filed under “legacy portal” — has done something that neither Google, nor Perplexity, nor ChatGPT has managed to

item.title: [Media] TripAdvisor Local SEO in 2026: The Complete Guide to Boosting Visibility, Rankings, and Bookings for Hospitality Businesses
item.description: Ask most local SEO practitioners what platforms they prioritize for a hotel or restaurant client, and TripAdvisor often gets mentioned third — or not at all. Google Business Profile takes the top spot, a website audit follows, and TripAdvisor sits somewhere in the “we’ll get to it eve

item.title: [Media] 5 B2B LinkedIn Ad Tests That Cut Cost Per Lead and Strengthen Pipeline Quality in 2026
item.description: LinkedIn now accounts for 41% of total B2B advertising budgets — the single largest paid channel allocation for B2B companies, according to Dreamdata’s 2026 Benchmarks Report. That is a meaningful shift. It reflects a growing acknowledgment among marketers that LinkedIn, despite its premium

item.title: [Media] Google Search “Your Related Activity” Now Shows a Search History Chart: What It Is, How It Works, and How to Control It
item.description: If you have ever typed a query into Google and noticed a small card near the top of the results page labeled “Your related activity” — you are not alone, and that card just got a meaningful upgrade. Google has added a visual chart to this existing feature, giving signed-in users a gra

item.title: [Media] Meta’s New Scam Protections for Facebook, WhatsApp, and Messenger: What Every User Needs to Know in 2026
item.description: Online scams are no longer a fringe problem buried in spam folders. They have become one of the defining challenges of connected life — industrialised, cross-border, and increasingly difficult to detect with the naked eye. In 2023, social media platforms were the origin point of 76% of all report

item.title: [Media] TikTok Now Streams Full Songs via Apple Music: Inside the ‘Play Full Song’ Feature, Listening Party, and What It Means for Artists, Fans, and Marketers
item.description: On March 11, 2026, TikTok and Apple Music jointly announced two features that fundamentally change how music is consumed on one of the world’s most-used social platforms. For the first time, Apple Music subscribers can now play complete, full-length tracks directly inside TikTok, without sw

item.title: [Media] WhatsApp Now Lets Parents Set Up Accounts for Kids Under 13: A Complete Guide to Parent-Managed Accounts
item.description: Messaging apps have long occupied a legal grey zone when it comes to children. WhatsApp’s own terms of service set the minimum age at 13. Yet the reality has always been messier. Parents in dozens of countries rely on WhatsApp as the primary way to keep in touch with their kids, school grou

item.title: [Media] YouTube Commits $20 Million to Teen Digital Literacy: What the Program Covers, Who It Benefits, and Why It Matters Right Now
item.description: There is a growing consensus among parents, educators, researchers, and policymakers that the internet is not going away — and neither are teenagers’ use of it. What is changing, however, is the global urgency around how young people learn to use it. Against that backdrop, YouTube and Googl

item.title: [Media] Reddit’s Report on B2B Marketing: What the Hidden Buyer Journey Data Actually Tells Us
item.description: There is a version of the B2B buying journey that most sales and marketing teams believe in: a prospect visits your website, downloads a white paper, enters a nurture sequence, hops on a discovery call, and converts. It is tidy, measurable, and increasingly disconnected from how business buying d

item.title: [Google] Ads Decoded episode 4 explores how to fuel your bidding and budgeting for better campaign performance.
item.description: Ads Decoded features a conversation on bidding and budgeting with product managers Kristina Park and Carlo Buchmann.

item.title: [Meta] Expanding Meta’s Custom Silicon to Power Our AI Workloads
[Meta] Meta Launches New Anti-Scam Tools, Deploys AI Technology to Fight Scammers and Protect People
[Meta] Global Law Enforcement Agencies, With Support From Meta, Disrupt Major Criminal Scam Networks Based in Southeast Asia
[Meta] Fighting Scammers and Protecting People with New Technology and Partnerships

[Media] Eight out of ten PMax advertisers are now running CTV ads
[Media] Yahoo adds personalized homepage to its Scout AI search engine

[Media] Google launches dedicated Merchant Center hub for agencies
[Media] AI citation data shows there is no universal top source for brands
[Media] Why Tripadvisor still matters for local SEO in 2026
[Media] The Complete SEO Checklist (2026): 49 Proven Steps to Rank Higher on Google, AI Overviews, and LLM Search
item.description: Most SEO checklists are either too short to be useful or so bloated that you finish reading more confused than when you started. This one is different. What you are about to read is a 49-step, fully sequenced checklist that covers every discipline in modern SEO: initial setup, keyword research, o

item.title: [Media] How to Optimize Product Pages for AI Search: What Google AI Mode, ChatGPT, and Perplexity Actually Look For
item.description: Here is a fact worth sitting with: 58% of consumers now use generative AI tools instead of traditional search to find products. When someone asks Google AI Mode for “the best waterproof hiking boots for wide feet,” they do not get a list of ten blue links. They get three to five produ

item.title: [Media] McDonald’s x Crocs Happy Meal 2026: The Complete Guide to the All American Games Mini Clog Keychains, Collectibles & What’s Inside
item.description: Starting March 10, 2026, McDonald’s restaurants across the United States began offering a limited-time Happy Meal tied to one of the chain’s oldest and most celebrated sports programs. The meal features six mini Crocs keychain toys, each modeled after the brand’s instantly recog

item.title: [Media] Dakota Johnson Stars in Calvin Klein’s Spring 2026 Campaign: The Complete Guide
item.description: On March 9, 2026, Calvin Klein officially launched its Spring 2026 campaign, placing actress Dakota Johnson at the centre of a stripped-back, intimacy-forward visual story built around new underwear and denim essentials. The campaign, directed and photographed by Gordon von Steiner, marks Johnson

item.title: [Media] X Money Goes Live in Beta: 6% APY, Visa Debit Card, and Peer-to-Peer Payments — A Full Breakdown of Elon Musk’s New Payments Platform
item.description: In early March 2026, a social media platform started functioning like a bank. X — the platform formerly known as Twitter — began a limited external beta rollout of X Money, its long-anticipated payments feature. The product offers a 6% annual percentage yield on deposits, a metal Visa debit card

item.title: [Media] LEGO® Pokémon™ Sets 2026: Every Set, Price, Release Date, and the Full Story Behind Toy’s Biggest Licensing Partnership
item.description: When LEGO and The Pokémon Company International announced their multi-year partnership on March 18, 2025, it was news that millions of people had waited literal decades for. Pokémon launched its original Game Boy titles in Japan in February 1996. For the better part of three decades, building bri

item.title: [Media] YouTube Is Now the World’s Largest Media Company: How $62.3 Billion in 2025 Revenue Put It Ahead of Disney
item.description: On February 14, 2005, three PayPal engineers — Chad Hurley, Steve Chen, and Jawed Karim — launched a website where people could upload and share short videos. Their first upload, a 19-second clip of Karim at the San Diego Zoo, was posted on April 23, 2005. Eighteen months later, Google purchased

item.title: [Media] How to Build a Content Marketing Strategy That Drives Real Results: A Complete, Fact-Based Guide
item.description: Most businesses produce content. Few produce content that actually works. The gap between those two groups is not talent, budget, or even creativity. It is strategy. According to the Content Marketing Institute’s 2025 B2B research, 58% of B2B marketers rate their own content marketing strat

item.title: [Media] Competitive Analysis in 2026: The Complete Step-by-Step Guide to Outperform Your Competition
item.description: Here is a number worth sitting with: 90% of Fortune 500 companies use competitive intelligence to maintain a market advantage. Yet the majority of small and mid-sized businesses conduct a competitive analysis only when they are about to launch something new — or when a competitor has already take

item.title: [Media] How AI Tools Are Reshaping the Modern Buyer Journey: Data From 1,030 U.S. Consumers
item.description: Half of U.S. consumers who use AI have already made a purchase after researching with it. That single data point, drawn from a December 2025 survey of 1,030 Americans conducted by Semrush, reframes something that marketers have been debating for two years: AI tools are not just a curiosity or an

item.title: [Media] 自動入札が思うように動かない？ よくある4つのパターンと対策
item.description: 広告運用の現場では、CV最大化（コンバージョン数最大化）やtCPA（目標コンバージョン単価）、tROAS（目標広告費用対効果）といった自動入札を活用した配信が、すでにスタンダードになっています。 「細…

item.title: [Media] Meta is passing Europe’s digital taxes directly to advertisers
[Media] How Meta Ads Attribution Works in 2026
[Media] P-MAX広告の「チャンネルのパフォーマンス」で何が分析できる？3つの活用方法と基本的な使い方を解説
item.description:
Google 広告の P-MAX キャンペーンは、コンバージョンの獲得を目的に利用されるケースも増え、すでに運用している方も多いのではないでしょうか。 しかし、 P-MAX は配信先が多岐にわたるため、「成果が出ているが …

"P-MAX広告の「チャンネルのパフォーマンス」で何が分析できる？3つの活用方法と基本的な使い方を解説

item.title: [Media] Conversions Lost Due to Attribution Changes
[Media] バナーは「飛び先」から逆算。クリックされても成果が出ない原因と、訴求設計4つのステップ
item.description: 「クリックはされるのに、成果に繋がらないバナー。次に作るなら、どんな訴求にしますか？」 こう聞かれたとき、すぐに答えられるでしょうか。見た目の完成度には自信がある。クリック率も悪くない。それなのにコン…

item.title: [Google] Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?
item.description: Learn more about AI Mode in Search’s query fan-out method for visual search.

item.title: [Media] Attribution Changes Could Hit Remarketing Hardest (Plus 5 Updates)
[Media] 成果を左右するのは冒頭3秒。Meta縦型動画が枯れない台本づくりのコツとは？
item.description: Meta広告において、今や欠かせない存在となった「縦型動画広告」。しかし、「最初は好調だったのに、すぐに獲得できなくなった」という悩みを抱えている方も多いのではないでしょうか。 本記事では、先日開催さ…

item.title: [Meta] How Meta’s Data Centers Support American Energy, Jobs, the Environment, and Local Communities

item.description: The past couple of years have marked a major chapter of growth for Rough Agenda – the organisers of brightonSEO, Hero Conf and MeasureFest. From expanding into the US with their annual event in San Diego, to acquiring Hero Conf and PPC Hero, Rough Agenda continues to build their presence as

item.title: [Meta] Meta Grants Are Fueling Innovation in Local Data Center Communities

item.description: 「ギフト向け商品の広告で、いつ、何から手をつけたらいいのか分からない」 ギフト商材を扱うマーケティング担当者の中には、このような悩みを抱えている方も多いのではないでしょうか。 ギフト商材は、自分用に購…

item.title: [Google] VRC Non-Skip ads are now generally available, allowing brands to reach TV audiences with Google AI.
item.description: VRC Non-Skip ads are now generally available globally in Google Ads and Display & Video 360.

item.title: [Media] Google広告「テキストに関するガイドライン」とは？AIが生成する広告文を制御する機能を解説
item.description: Google広告のAI最大化設定やP-MAXキャンペーンを活用していて、AIが生成する広告文のコントロールに悩んでいませんか。「テキストに関するガイドライン」は、AIによる自動生成テキストにブランドの…

item.title: [Media] Avoid Meta Andromeda Misinformation

item.description: 皆さんはミーティングで、相手と意見が一致しないケースに遭遇したことはありませんか？ クライアントとの商談だけでなく、社内の企画会議やチーム内の方針決めなど、「こちらが良いと思っている提案を受け入れても…

item.description: We’ve updated Circle to Search so you can now explore multiple items in a single image.

item.title: [Google] Ads Decoded episode 3 explores how Google is reimagining Search ads experiences in a way that delivers value for both users and advertisers.
item.description: Ads Decoded explores how the updated Search ads experience aims to deliver value for both users and advertisers.

item.title: [Meta] Meta and AMD Partner for Longterm AI Infrastructure Agreement

[Media] 動画広告のナレーション音質、どこまでこだわるべき？目的別に考える判断基準と実践ガイド
item.description: 「動画にナレーションを入れたいけれど、何を用意したら良いか分からない」 「自分の制作したい動画にはどの程度の音質が必要なの？」 動画広告の制作において、こうした音質に関する相談は非常に多く寄せられます…

item.title: [Media] Nothing About Targeting is the Same
[Google] New Meridian tool puts MMM insights directly in marketers' hands.
item.description: Scenario Planner makes MMM insights accessible to marketers. The no-code UI helps teams turn complex data into actionable plans.
